title: Design authentication flow wireframes
description: Create low-fidelity wireframes for the login and registration screens.

title: Set up PostgreSQL database schema
description: Initialize the database and create tables for users and tasks.

title: Implement JWT authentication
description: Write the API endpoints for user login and token generation.

title: Build Kanban board UI layout
description: Convert Figma designs into HTML/CSS using CSS Grid and Flexbox.

title: Write unit tests for Store module
description: Ensure state updates are immutable and subscribers are notified.

title: Integrate drag and drop API
description: Allow users to move task cards between columns using HTML5 Drag and Drop.

title: Fix memory leak in EventBus
description: The off() method is not properly removing listeners. Needs debugging.

title: Create dark mode color tokens
description: Define CSS variables for the dark theme based on the new style guide.

title: Draft API documentation
description: Document all REST endpoints using OpenAPI/Swagger syntax.

title: Implement search debouncing
description: Ensure the search input waits 300ms before firing a filter update.

title: Configure IndexedDB schema
description: Set up the object stores for the offline queue and cached tasks.

title: Test offline sync resolution
description: Verify that queued operations play back in the correct order when reconnecting.

title: Design empty states
description: Create illustrations and copy for when a column or search result is empty.

title: Update dependencies
description: Audit and update any testing libraries to their latest stable versions.

title: Fix modal focus trap
description: Keyboard navigation escapes the modal. Needs a focus loop on open.

title: Implement Analytics Web Worker
description: Move the task counting and completion math off the main UI thread.

title: Add Undo/Redo command stack
description: Implement the Command pattern to allow reversing the last 20 actions.

title: Validate task creation form
description: Ensure titles are 3-100 characters and show inline error messages.

title: Review PR for filtering logic
description: Check if multiple active filters behave correctly without mutating source data.

title: Design responsive mobile layout
description: Determine how the Kanban columns will stack or convert to a list on small screens.

title: Implement mobile List View
description: Write the renderer for the table view when users switch modes.

title: Create 1,000-task generator script
description: Write a development utility to flood the state for performance profiling.

title: Test keyboard shortcuts
description: Ensure Ctrl+Z and Ctrl+Shift+Z fire the correct undo/redo events.

title: Handle API timeout errors
description: Implement AbortController to cancel requests taking longer than 5 seconds.

title: Write final architecture README
description: Document the state flow, offline strategy, and explain the undo/redo decision.
